title: Juzʾ partition J1 smoothness test: do the canonical 30-juzʾ boundaries minimise 5-D feature discontinuity more than random partitions of the same size distribution?
method: Mirror of expE17b_mushaf_j1_1m_perms but at juzʾ granularity. Same J1 = sum of squared Mahalanobis transitions in pre-whitened coords; same ridge=1e-6; same `(k+1)/(N+1)` p-bound. Random null preserves the canonical juzʾ size histogram (30 contiguous windows in random size-permutation order) so the test isolates BOUNDARY PLACEMENT, not size variance.
